description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and daily at 12:00 UTC. The workflow should have three jobs: lint, build, and container. The lint job should check out the code, set up Python 3.6, install dependencies, and lint Python files with pyflakes and mypy. The build job should use a matrix strategy to test different environments, set up Python 3.6, install dependencies, build the project with cmake, and run tests with nosetests. The container job should build a Docker image and publish it to the GitHub Docker registry.
